name: azure_iot_edge
explanation: Azure IoT Edge runtime exposes Prometheus metrics from two modules (edgeHub and edgeAgent), both on the well-known port 9600 at the canonical /metrics path. The check inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheck and the spec uses the openmetrics_legacy template; no credentials are required. Two endpoints are needed instead of one, but each is a stock OpenMetrics scrape on a fixed port, so a generic openmetrics-port-scan probe over port 9600 (run twice, once per module hostname/IP) is sufficient. Container Autodiscovery is the documented installation path - the README ships com.datadoghq.ad.* labels with both URLs hardcoded - which strongly indicates the deployment shape is autodiscoverable.
notes: Two-endpoint OpenMetrics scrape on the same fixed port 9600 (edgeHub and edgeAgent containers). Pattern A variant; auto-config layer must enumerate both runtime modules.
